---
title: 'The World&#39;s Broken Babylonian Financial System is Crashing! Praise God!'

blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'

  - 'Finances'
---

So, things are crazy in the world.<br /><br />The United States of America, God's Country, is NOT ending. We are NOT seeing the failure of&nbsp;capitalism, so to speak. We ARE seeing the death of socialism and man's twisting of God's systems. The USA will arise out of this financial mess and help to bring the The Lord Jesus back in an end times revival awakening to the world.<br /><br />It is interesting to see how crazy the world has become though. World leaders are confused and there are over 100 world financial leaders that have stepped down recently... This shows how confused the world is about why their system isn't working.<br /><br /><br />I got the following in an email:<br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;"><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: 'Comic Sans MS'; font-size: 10pt;">I believe the total is up to 110 now within the last 4 weeks…</span><span style="font-family: 'Comic Sans MS'; font-size: 10pt;"><u></u><u></u></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;"><br /></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">Monday, February 27, 2012<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">BANK CEO AND EXECUTIVE RESIGNATION UPDATE 2/27/12<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">81 RESIGNATIONS FROM WORLD BANKS 2/27/12<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(1) 9/01/11 (USA NY) Bank of New York Mellon Chief Resigns in a Shake-UP<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://loanworkout.org/2011/09/bank-of-new-york-mellon-chief-resigns-in-a-shake-up/" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://loanworkout.org/2011/<wbr></wbr>09/bank-of-new-york-mellon-<wbr></wbr>chief-resigns-in-a-shake-up/</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(2) 09/20/12 (SCOTLAND) SCOTTISH WIDOWS (RETIREMENT INVESTMENT SAVINGS FUND) There could be no Scottish representative on the board of Lloyds Banking Group, owner of Bank of Scotland, in future after it announced the departure of Lord Sandy Leitch, the chairman of Scottish Widows and group deputy chairman.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.heraldscotland.com/mobile/business/company-news/warning-as-last-scot-leaves-lloyds-board-lloyds-could-lack-scottish-voice.15150830?_=20e772c9486b6372433ff2b886a31e9fca7eeb2a" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.heraldscotland.com/<wbr></wbr>mobile/business/company-news/<wbr></wbr>warning-as-last-scot-leaves-<wbr></wbr>lloyds-board-lloyds-could-<wbr></wbr>lack-scottish-voice.15150830?_<wbr></wbr>=<wbr></wbr>20e772c9486b6372433ff2b886a31e<wbr></wbr>9fca7eeb2a</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(3) 9/25/11 (SWITZERLAND) Bank chief resigns over £1.5bn rogue trader crisis<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); (STILL OUT AS OF 2/24/12 – DEFACTO RESIGNATION)<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.bankingtimes.co.uk/2012/02/01/lloyds-head-of-wholesale-quits/" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.bankingtimes.co.uk/<wbr></wbr>2012/02/01/lloyds-head-of-<wbr></wbr>wholesale-quits/</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">"Mr Tookey, who has been with the group since 2006, will leave at the end of February after preparing the bank’s accounts for 2011. He will not get a pay-off."<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(43) 2/15/12 (SLOVENIA) Slovenia TWO largest Banks CEO's (2) resign<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(44) 2/15/12 (KENYA) Governor of Kenyan Central Bank to Resign<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.centralbanking.com/central-banking/news/2152753/parliamentary-committee-calls-kenyan-governor-resign" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.centralbanking.com/<wbr></wbr>central-banking/news/2152753/<wbr></wbr>parliamentary-committee-calls-<wbr></wbr>kenyan-governor-resign</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(45) 2/16/12 (UNITED KINGDOM) The Financial Services Authority’s (FSA’s) interim managing director, Conduct Business Unit, Margaret Cole, is to step down later this year.<br />FSA is the regulator of all providers of financial services in the UK; Bank of England retains<br />responsibility for systemic risk.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.bankingtimes.co.uk/2012/02/16/fsas-cole-to-step-down/" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.bankingtimes.co.uk/<wbr></wbr>2012/02/16/fsas-cole-to-step-<wbr></wbr>down/</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://newsley.com/articles/head-of-russian-bank-regulator-steps-down/206711" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://newsley.com/articles/<wbr></wbr>head-of-russian-bank-<wbr></wbr>regulator-steps-down/206711</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.businessweek.com/news/2012-02-20/credit-suisse-s-private-bank-chief-asian-economist-tan-resigns.html" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.businessweek.com/<wbr></wbr>news/2012-02-20/credit-suisse-<wbr></wbr>s-private-bank-chief-asian-<wbr></wbr>economist-tan-resigns.html</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(56) 2/20/12 (ISRAEL) Bank Leumi le-Israel Ltd. : Mr. Zvi Itskovitch Announces his Decision to Redesign From Bank Leumi<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.4-traders.com/BANK-LEUMI-LE-ISRAEL-LTD-6491695/news/BANK-LEUMI-LE-ISRAEL-LTD-Mr-Zvi-Itskovitch-Announces-his-Decision-to-Redesign-From-Bank-Leumi-14031540/" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.4-traders.com/BANK-<wbr></wbr>LEUMI-LE-ISRAEL-LTD-6491695/<wbr></wbr>news/BANK-LEUMI-LE-ISRAEL-LTD-<wbr></wbr>Mr-Zvi-Itskovitch-Announces-<wbr></wbr>his-Decision-to-Redesign-From-<wbr></wbr>Bank-Leumi-14031540/</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(57) 2/20/12 (USA) R. David Land Submits Resignation from the Boards of Directors of Peoples Bancorporation, Inc. and Seneca National Bank<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://investing.businessweek.com/research/stocks/private/snapshot.asp?privcapId=25695731" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://investing.businessweek.<wbr></wbr>com/research/stocks/private/<wbr></wbr>snapshot.asp?privcapId=<wbr></wbr>25695731</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(58) 2/20/12 (USA WA) First Financial Northwest Director Quits in Candy Austerity Push[shades of the movie The Caine Mutiny?] First Financial Northwest Inc., a Renton, Washington-based lender, said director Spencer Schneider resigned after asking the bank to remove pictures of past directors and serve only hard candies at annual meetings.Schneider made the requests at a Feb. 15 board meeting as “symbols of austerity,” and also asked that the bank suspend serving refreshments at the annual shareholders’ meeting, offering just hard candies instead, he said. Schneider, general counsel for shareholder Joseph Stilwell, resigned immediately when the company asked that his requests be placed on the agenda for a board meeting next month, the bank said yesterday.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.businessweek.com/news/2012-02-20/first-financial-northwest-director-quits-in-candy-austerity-push.html" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.businessweek.com/<wbr></wbr>news/2012-02-20/first-<wbr></wbr>financial-northwest-director-<wbr></wbr>quits-in-candy-austerity-push.<wbr></wbr>html</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(59) 2/21/12 (ARGENTINA) The general manager of the Central Bank of Argentina (BCRA), Benigno Velez, resigned his position today.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://m24digital.com/en/2012/02/21/the-general-manager-of-the-bcra-benigno-velez-resigned-today/" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://m24digital.com/en/2012/<wbr></wbr>02/21/the-general-manager-of-<wbr></wbr>the-bcra-benigno-velez-<wbr></wbr>resigned-today/</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(60) 2/21/12 (BANGLADESH) Five bank, insurance directors resign<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.thefinancialexpress-bd.com/more.php?news_id=120917&amp;date=2012-02-21" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.<wbr></wbr>thefinancialexpress-bd.com/<wbr></wbr>more.php?news_id=120917&amp;date=<wbr></wbr>2012-02-21</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(61) 2/21/12 (JAPAN) CITIBANK JAPAN: Bakhshi is taking over duties from Brian Mccappin, who the bank said in December would resign after the unit was banned for two weeks from trading tied to the London and Tokyo interbank offered rates.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.bloomberg.com/news/2012-02-21/citigroup-stakes-u-s-mutuals-efsf-bond-program-compliance.html" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.bloomberg.com/news/<wbr></wbr>2012-02-21/citigroup-stakes-u-<wbr></wbr>s-mutuals-efsf-bond-program-<wbr></wbr>compliance.html</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(62) 2/22/12 (USA) Wietschner, Goldman Hedge Fund Advisory Chief, Retires<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="https://www.finalternatives.com/node/19689" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">https://www.finalternatives.<wbr></wbr>com/node/19689</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(63) 2/23/12 (SOUTH AFRICA) Richard Gush resigns from Standard Bank<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://mobile.bloomberg.com/news/2012-02-23/standard-bank-says-merrill-lynch-hires-investment-banker-gush" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://mobile.bloomberg.com/<wbr></wbr>news/2012-02-23/standard-bank-<wbr></wbr>says-merrill-lynch-hires-<wbr></wbr>investment-banker-gush</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(64) 2/23/12 (SCOTLAND) Royal Bank of Scotland Group has announced that John McFarlane will step down as a Non-executive Director on 31 March 2012, as a regulatory condition of his impending appointment at Aviva.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(65) 2/24/12 (INDIA) Breaking: ICICI Bank GC Pramod Rao resigns, may start up law firm<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.legallyindia.com/201202242600/In-house-counsel/breaking-icici-bank-gc-pramod-rao-resigns-may-start-up-law-firm" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.legallyindia.com/<wbr></wbr>201202242600/In-house-counsel/<wbr></wbr>breaking-icici-bank-gc-pramod-<wbr></wbr>rao-resigns-may-start-up-law-<wbr></wbr>firm</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(66) 2/24/12 (HONG KONG) Citigroup Private Bank’s Co-Head of Global Real Estate Resigns<br />Feb. 24 (Bloomberg) — Kwang Meng Quek, co-head of the global real estate group at Citigroup Inc.’s private banking unit, resigned.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.businessweek.com/news/2012-02-24/citigroup-private-bank-s-co-head-of-global-real-estate-resigns.html" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.businessweek.com/<wbr></wbr>news/2012-02-24/citigroup-<wbr></wbr>private-bank-s-co-head-of-<wbr></wbr>global-real-estate-resigns.<wbr></wbr>html</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(67) 2/24/12 (NEW ZEALAND) FSF Executive Director resigns<br />After two years leading the Financial Services Federation (“FSF”) executive director, Kirk Hope has resigned to take up the role of chief executive of the New Zealand Bankers? Association.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.voxy.co.nz/business/fsf-executive-director-resigns/5/115797" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.voxy.co.nz/<wbr></wbr>business/fsf-executive-<wbr></wbr>director-resigns/5/115797</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(68) 2/24/12 (USA) Evercore’s Mestre steps down as U.S. banking head<br />(Reuters) – Eduardo Mestre has stepped down as day-to-day head of Evercore Partners Inc’s U.S. investment banking business, the New York-based company said in a regulatory filing<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(69) 2/25/12 (AUSTRALIA AND NEW ZEALAND) Goldman Sachs: Fitz quits<br />Stephen Fitzgerald has resigned as Australia and New Zealand chairman and advisory director at Goldman Sachs, after 20 years with the bank. His departure comes less than a year after Goldman took full control of its Australian joint venture, formerly known as Goldman Sachs JBWere.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.ifrasia.com/goldman-sachs-fitz-quits/21001856.article" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.ifrasia.com/<wbr></wbr>goldman-sachs-fitz-quits/<wbr></wbr>21001856.article</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(70) 2/27/12 (GERMANY) Deutsche Bank Americas chief steps down<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.efinancialnews.com/story/2012-02-27/equiduct-chairman-steps-down?mod=sectionheadlines-home-TT" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.efinancialnews.com/<wbr></wbr>story/2012-02-27/equiduct-<wbr></wbr>chairman-steps-down?mod=<wbr></wbr>sectionheadlines-home-TT</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(77) 2/27/12 (BAHRAIN) Al Zain steps down as Mumtalakat Holding CEO<br />The board of directors of Bahrain Mumtalakat Holding Company (Mumtalakat),Bahrain’s Sovereign Wealth Fund, has accepted the resignation of the Chief Executive Officer, Talal Al Zain, following the completion of a four year term as head of the investment arm for non-oil and gas assets of the Kingdom of Bahrain.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://twentyfoursevennews.com/bahrain-news/al-zain-steps-down-as-mumtalakat-holding-ceo/" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://twentyfoursevennews.<wbr></wbr>com/bahrain-news/al-zain-<wbr></wbr>steps-down-as-mumtalakat-<wbr></wbr>holding-ceo/</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(78) 2/27/12 (IRAN) Iran’s Bank Melli CEO Resigns Over Loan Scam<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(80) 2/27/12 (UNITED KINGDOM) Moreno to step down at Lloyds Banking Group<br />Lloyds Banking Group has announced that Glen Moreno, its senior independent director, intends not to seek re-election at the bank’s annual general meeting on 17th May, and will retire from the board on that date.<u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"><a href="http://www.bankingtimes.co.uk/2012/02/27/moreno-to-step-down-at-lloyds/" style="color: #1155cc;" target="_blank">http://www.bankingtimes.co.uk/<wbr></wbr>2012/02/27/moreno-to-step-<wbr></wbr>down-at-lloyds/</a><u></u><u></u></span></div><div style="background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.917969); color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; text-align: justify;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;">(81) 2/28/12 (HONG KONG) Leung `to enjoy life’ as she calls it quits</span></div>
